zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Moretyn II於1248年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯時，他的父親John Morteyn15歲，母親Constance Merston13歲。他於1272年與Joan Gobion在英國貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1296年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾馬爾斯頓 莫利恩享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moretyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Morton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Moretyn II was born in 1248, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Morteyn, was 15 and his mother, Constance Merston, was 13. He married Joan Gobion in 1272, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1296, in Marston Moreteyne, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

Il a épousé Joan Gobion en 1272, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1296, à Marston Moreteyne, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Moretyn IIが1248年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスで生まれた時，父John Morteynは15歳，母Constance Merstonは13歳であった。1272年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスでJoan Gobionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1296年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアマーストン モーエテインで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Moretyn II(이)가 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Morteyn(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Merston(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1272년 영국 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 Joan Gobion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1296년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 마스턴 모레테이니에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.
